data.fix_hint: The query asks for SPY S&P 500 ETF holdings composition, which is typically found in fund prospectuses, fact sheets, or annual reports filed by the fund sponsor (State Street Global Advisors). Try searching SEC EDGAR using: (1) "SPY" with document type 485APOS or N-CSR, (2) the fund's CIK number (State Street S&P 500 ETF Trust), or (3) include specific terms like "portfolio holdings," "composition," or "schedule of investments" which appear in fund annual/semi-annual reports.
